title: calliandra tumbeziana
intro: Calliandra tumbeziana is a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae, commonly known as the pea family. Native to Peru, this plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Calliandra tumbeziana include its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to lower blood sugar levels and reduce fever. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
